name: TPG Operating Group II L.P. 6.950% Fixed-Rate Junior Subordinated Notes due 2064
summary: TPG Operating Group II L.P. 6.950% Fixed-Rate Junior Subordinated Notes due 2064 represents a debt security issued by TPG Operating Group II L.P. The notes represent junior subordinated obligations with a fixed interest rate that mature in 2064. The operating group is affiliated with TPG Inc.
